body.thing: builder merge-time proof (emit_merge_proof): a merged branch-builder branch emits a HEAD-valid proof that flips the ticket shipped-unproven -> proven
body.intention: After a builder branch merges to HEAD, emit_merge_proof produces a proof the close-gate accepts, so the ticket flips to proven instead of CC eyeballing the branch

body.why: The offload loop only reduces CC's queue once builder throughput closes proven; the flip must happen from a real merge, not a mock
